metadata.title: Israeli Arnona Rates - 54 Major Cities
metadata.description: Comprehensive dataset of municipal property tax (arnona) rates across Israel's 54 largest cities
metadata.note: Arnona is calculated per square meter of residential property. Rates vary significantly by municipality and neighborhood. 2026 rates automatically updated by 1.626% nationwide.

cities.olim_discount: 90% discount on first 100 sqm for 24 months within first 2 years of Aliyah
cities.large_family_discount: Income-based discounts available if income below municipal threshold
cities.other_discounts: Senior citizens, disabled persons, single parent families, students, IDF soldiers on active duty
cities.notes: Highest arnona rate among major Israeli cities. Varies by neighborhood and property type (73-100 NIS/sqm in central areas). Rate as of September 2025.

cities.olim_discount: 90% discount on first 100 sqm for 24 months within first 2 years of Aliyah
cities.other_discounts: Senior citizens, disabled persons, single parent families, low-income households
cities.notes: Range from 40.40 to 113.22 NIS/sqm depending on neighborhood. Updated discount criteria released 2025. Deadline for applications: August 31.

cities.olim_discount: 90% discount on first 100 sqm for 24 months within first 2 years of Aliyah
cities.other_discounts: Senior citizens, disabled persons, students, veterans
cities.notes: Ranges from 40 to 110 NIS/sqm across 4 zones. Among highest arnona rates in country. 2025 fiscal year rates established.

cities.olim_discount: 90% discount on first 100 sqm for 24 months within first 2 years of Aliyah
cities.other_discounts: Various discounts and exemptions for qualifying groups
cities.notes: Rates set by municipality annually. Official arnona information available from municipality. Online payment options available.

cities.olim_discount: 90% discount on first 100 sqm for 24 months within first 2 years of Aliyah
cities.other_discounts: Standard apartment: 48 NIS/sqm; Penthouse/detached house: 51.36 NIS/sqm; Over 170 sqm: up to 60 NIS/sqm
cities.notes: Uniform rates across all neighborhoods. Tiered by property type and size. Among lowest rates in Israel.

cities.olim_discount: 90% discount on first 100 sqm for 24 months within first 2 years of Aliyah
cities.other_discounts: Old neighborhoods: 41.26 NIS/sqm; New neighborhoods: 47.48 NIS/sqm
cities.notes: Lower arnona rates in established neighborhoods. Among most affordable cities for property tax. Earned high rating in arnona affordability study.

cities.other_discounts: Comparable to other central district cities
cities.notes: Less expensive than Bat Yam and Bnei Brak. Central district coastal city. Specific 2025 rates not published online.

cities.olim_discount: 90% discount on first 100 sqm for 24 months within first 2 years of Aliyah
cities.other_discounts: Rates range from 35.78 to 82.65 NIS/sqm by zone

notes.confidence_levels: HIGH: Official municipal source or multiple verified sources with specific 2025 rates. MEDIUM: Multiple reliable sources with consistent data. LOW: Estimated based on regional patterns and incomplete data sources.
notes.olim_discounts: All cities offer the standard 90% discount on first 100 sqm within 24 months of Aliyah as per 2025-2026 national policy. Olim chadashim must have teudat oleh and appear on arnona bill.
notes.national_average: Estimated at 55 NIS/sqm for residential properties. Major variation exists between development towns (40-45 NIS) and central district cities (65-75 NIS).
notes.2026_update: All 2025 rates subject to automatic 1.626% increase for 2026 per Ministry of Interior formula.
notes.income_tax_benefits: New immigrants arriving in 2026 will pay 0% income tax in 2026-2027, with gradual increases to 30% by 2030 on incomes up to 1 million NIS.
notes.data_gaps: Many smaller municipalities lack publicly available 2025 arnona rates in English. Contact municipality tax offices directly (arnonot/iriyot) for most current rates and specific discounts.
